omissions.reason_not_inlined: The full expanded expression contains 96 tensor-integral terms spanning all possible contractions of scalar coefficient functions f(k), g(k), h(k) with their derivatives up to third order, cross-multiplied with epsilon and 1/Lambda expansions, Levi-Civita contractions, and directional projection factors n_i. Displaying all 96 terms inline would require approximately 4 journal pages of dense notation without adding physical insight. The complete expression is provided as a machine-readable electronic artifact for verification and reproducibility.
omissions.reader_guidance: Readers interested in the full expansion should consult the electronic artifact long_expression_artifact.txt. The main text retains only the leading terms necessary to establish the integrated result R_ij = C_0 delta_ij + C_2 I_ij.
